C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, JDG LILLIAN K SING PRESIDING; CLERK J. BAUBEL; RPTR C. MANDIA; PLFF APPEARED BY ATTY SIDNEY BERN STEIN, DEFT APPEARED IN PRO PER. BOTH SIDES SWORN, TESTIFY, PLFF EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED; COURT TAKES MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

COURT RULES ON SUBMITTED MATTER VIA JUDGMENT SIGNED AND FILE D THIS DATE. COURT FINDS PLFF BREACHED WARRANTY OF HABITABI LITY AND REDUCES RENT TO $529 PER MO COMMENCING 01-JUL-01 AN D CONTINUING THEREAFTER UNTIL PREMISES ARE REPAIRED AT WHICH TIME RENT SHALL REVERT TO $588 PER MO. DEFT SHALL HAVE POSS ESSION OF PREMISES AT 261 ADDISON ST. AND SHALL PAY RENT IN AMOUNT OF $529 PER MO COMMENCING 01-JUL-01 FOR A TOTAL OF $1587.60 DUE BY 10-SEP-01 AND SHALL PAY RENT OF $529 PER MO THEREAFTER UNTIL PREMISES REPAIRED, THEN SHALL PAY $588 PER MO. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY TOTAL RENT DUE BY 10-SEP-01, JUDGMENT SHALL ENTER IN FAVOR OF PLFF FOR POSSESSION OF PREM ISES, FOR $1587.60 MONEY DAMAGES AND FOR COSTS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF DIAMOND VIEW RESIDENCE ASSOCIATION, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 261 ADDISON ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $529.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $529.20, STAYED UNTIL SEP-10-2001, DEFT SHALL HAVE POSSESSION OF PREMISES. DEFT SHALL PAY RENT IN SUM OF $529.20 BY 10-SEP-01. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY RENT BY DUE DATE JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AS OF 10-SEP-01 IN FAV OR OF PLFF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AND FOR MONEY DAMAGES IN SUM OF $529.20 PLUS COSTS. EA SIDE BEARS OWN ATTY FEES.
